reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
강경 건식파라 습식은 먹는게 거의 없고 츄르도 조금만 뭐가 마음에 안들면 바로 안먹는애에요
갑기항 판정을 받고 하루 두번 약을 꼬박꼬박 먹어야되서 약 줄때마다 츄르를 주게 되었어요 이나바 챠오츄르를 엄청 좋아해서 그것만 사 두었었는데 기존에 가~끔 간식으로 줄 땐 생각없이 줬지만 매일 츄르를 먹게 되다보니 좀 더 건강하고 국산제품으로 먹이고 싶더라구요ㅎㅎ 그래서 검색해보다가 바잇미에서 츄르를 사보게 되었어요 

바잇미는 서플리츄든 이 헤어볼 츄르든 기호성이 진짜 미쳤네요... 먹을때 혀 속도가 다른 츄르들과는 달라요 저희집 애는 이나바 츄르 먹을때보다 더 열심히 빨리 먹어요 ㅋㅋㅋ 조공 츄르들도 안먹는애라 사실 사면서도 긴가민가 했었거든요 14g짜리 츄르는 아침 저녁 두번에 나눠서 급여했는데 이건 한 스틱에 7g이라 굳이 나눠서 급여할 필요도 없어서 편합니당 ㅋㅋ 

바로 30개들이 3팩 세트 저렴하게 구매 하였습니다 자주자주 행사 해 주세용!!!!
reviews.content_en:
My cat is picky with dry food, wet food, and even treats - she won't eat them if something doesn't suit her. After being diagnosed with a condition requiring medication twice a day, I started giving her treats every time I give her medicine. She absolutely loved INABA Ciao Churu, so I only bought that at first. But since she started eating churu daily instead of just occasionally, I wanted to switch to something healthier and domestically produced lol. So I searched around and ended up trying BITE ME churu!

BITE ME's palatability is seriously insane, whether it's the supplement churu or this hairball churu... The speed at which she licks it is different from other churus. My cat eats it much more eagerly and quickly than the INABA churu lol. Since my cat doesn't even eat other brand churus, I was honestly hesitant when ordering, but the 7g sticks are so convenient - I can give one in the morning and one at night without having to split them lol.

I bought a 3-pack set of 30 pieces at a great price. Please have sales more often!!!!

reviews.content_en:
🧡Honest review from Employee Cat🧡
Hey! I'm Choi Timo, the office cat!
I pride myself on grooming more thoroughly than my friends! Honestly, I eat hair so much every day that my bathroom trips get a bit rough... and I throw up sometimes, so my unnie and mom kept trying to feed me all kinds of supplements and stuff, but you know what? As a cat, that's absolutely unforgivable, right? It was constant warfare, but this Daily Care Hairball? It tastes like the special chicken breast treat mom gives me! Seriously amazing... I don't normally get excited about churus before opening them, but my mouth just goes for it on its own... Something this delicious is also good for my body? Well, what can I do. Even if it hurts my cat pride a bit, I gotta eat it nom. For a chunky 7kg royal cat like me, the calories are totally manageable, so trust me, Choi Timo, and give it a try! See you next month with a new review!

Munzi's Daily Care Hairball contains psyllium husk, chitosan, and dietary fiber from ulmus bark so I thought... oh, it's not just a supplement by name, they actually know what they're making 🤭 I've heard these ingredients mentioned when searching for hairball concerns and they're all thoughtfully included. Some treats with lots of ingredients claiming to be good just add random stuff, but my Pepper has allergies so I can't give those. This one only has the necessary ingredients which is great. Even with small amounts, she gets diarrhea so I can't give it daily, but at just 7g it's a very small amount which is good. Most importantly, unlike other supplements where I have to break pills to adjust portions or mix into wet food, this is so convenient 😌 ⭐️ Just give one pouch a day and you're done! In Pepper's case, I replaced her daily ear cleaning reward treat with Munzi's Daily Care Hairball and it works perfectly. It's been 10 days and she hasn't vomited once 😼 This time the 7-pouch version has been released so you can try small amounts first. If you're looking for a convenient and tasty hairball supplement, I recommend it

깔끔쟁이라 그루밍을 꼼꼼히 하다보니 먹는 털도 어마어마할거 같더라구요
그러던 중에 한달에 1-2번 하던 헤어볼토를 매주 하는걸 보고 헤어볼케어를 해볼까하다가도 입맛이 너무 까다로워서 겁내던 차에 체험해보게 되었어요!!  일주일 체험후기예요!

기호성!
순자의 까다로운 입맛에 두근되었으나 빵꾸를 내가며 먹는걸 보면 말 다했쥬 최고,,
헤어볼케어 효과!
일주일마다 헤어볼 토를 하고 있었는데 웬걸 열흘째 말짱한걸보니 효과가 있어서 엄청 대만족 중이예요! 

이후 내돈내산으로 꾸준히 먹일 예정이예요!
퇴근 후 보상처럼 물에 섞어주면 음수량도 채우고 일석삼조!
reviews.content_en:
Soonja is a long-haired cat going through her first shedding season after becoming an adult, and even if I brush her for a fistful each day, she sheds an insane amount of fur. Since she's meticulous about grooming, I figured she'd be swallowing a lot of hair too. We went from having hairball vomiting 1-2 times a month to weekly, so I thought about trying hairball care, but I was hesitant because her taste is so picky. Then I got a chance to try it! Here's my one-week review!!

Palate appeal!
I was nervous about Soonja's picky taste, but seeing her eat it whole says it all—it's the best!!

Hairball care effect!
She was throwing up hairballs weekly, but look—10 days in and nothing! The effect is real, and I'm incredibly satisfied!

I plan to keep buying this with my own money going forward!
After work, I mix it with water as a treat—it helps her hydration intake and does triple duty! 🙌

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
입맛에 맞는지 너무 잘먹어요!!
살짝 묽은 제형인데 부드러워서 삼키기 좋은것 같아요
한포 용량도 적당하고 저칼로리라서 간식처럼 먹이기 너무 좋습니다 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: She eats it so well because it matches her taste! The consistency is slightly thin but smooth, so it seems easy to swallow. The portion size per packet is just right, and since it's low-calorie, it's perfect to give as a treat ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 기호성 좋다는 이바나 츄르도 잘안먹는 까탈스러운 냥이이인데 이건먹어서 샀어요ㅋ 7일분 한번 사봤더니 먹더라구요~지금도 간식으로 주고있구요 양도 적당하고 털 뿜뿜인데 토도 안하고 아주 만족스럽네요~세일만 자주해주시길ㅎㅎ  다만 액체라서 이를 잘 닦아줘야겠어요:)
reviews.content_en: Even my picky cat who doesn't eat much, even brands known for good palatability, eats this one, so I bought it ㅋ I got a 7-day supply and she actually ate it~I'm still giving it to her as a treat, the portion is right, and even though she sheds a lot, she's not throwing up at all—very satisfied~ I hope you do sales often ㅎㅎ Just need to make sure to brush her teeth well since it's liquid :)

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content:

요즘 계절이 바뀌는걸 아이들도 아는지 아이들 몸이먼저 반음 집에 털이 뿜뿜~!
털이 날릴정도인데 아이들 그루밍하면서 삼켜질 털을 생각하니. 어후..

다 먹어서 먼지 데일리케어 헤어볼 구입해봤어요

안드신다면 낭패라.ㅜ.ㅜㅋ

냥이들 헤어볼은 꼭 관리해주어야 건강에 적신호가
안생긴다고 하니..앞으로 꾸준하게 먼지랑 함께 관리하려고 합니다!!
reviews.content_en:
Our baby's daily hairball care is now decided on you!! 🧡

Since the season is changing, our kids' bodies are reacting first—fur is shedding everywhere at home~!
With all that shedding, thinking about the fur she swallows while grooming... ugh..
I was already giving a daily hairball care product, but it ran out, so I bought MUNZI daily care hairball!
Since we have multiple cats, I got 7 packets to test first (the risk if they don't eat it ㅜ.ㅜㅋ).
Luckily all three of our cats eat it so well!
The 7g portion size is perfect for one serving~ plus it's low-calorie too~~!!
Since proper hairball management is essential for cats' health and prevents warning signs...
I plan to consistently manage hairballs with MUNZI going forward!!

reviews.content:
중장모인 울냥님 헤어볼을 항상 신경쓰는데 요걸로 픽했어요~ 먹이기 편하고 츄르처럼 한개씩 먹어요~ 우선 거부감 없이 달라고 기다립니다~ 4개월치 사서 먹기시작했는데 젤형이 생각보다 묽고 양이 조금 작아서 저에겐 좋았어요~ 츄르같은 간식느낌이 아니라 영양제 느낌~
고양이의 숙명 헤어볼에서 자유해지는 물건(?)이 될것같은 느낌~~ 정착될듯합니다~ 열심히 먹일께요
reviews.content_en:
I always worry about my long-haired cat's hairballs, so I went with this~ It's easy to feed and she eats it one by one like a treat~ First of all, she has no hesitation and waits asking for more~ I bought a 4-month supply and started feeding it, and the gel form is thinner than expected with a slightly smaller amount, which is actually good for me~ Rather than a treat-like churu feeling, it feels more like a nutritional supplement~
It really seems like it could be the thing(?) that frees cats from their destined hairball fate~~ I think it'll become a staple~ I'll keep feeding it diligently

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 입맛 까다로운 우엉이가 처음부터 잘 먹었던 츄르! 최근 들어 안하던 헤어볼 토를 하기 시작해서, 예전에 구매했던 제품이 생각나 들어왔더니 마침 할인행사 중이라 운좋게 저렴히 구매했네여. 헤어볼 토를 하고 난 뒤로 이걸 매일 급여하고 난 뒤론 기분 탓인지 토를 좀 덜 하는 것 같기두 하고요..! 일단 꾸준히 급여해볼 생각입니다. 효과 좋으면 계속 구매 할 생각이고요. 일단 입 짧은 애가 잘 먹어주는 것만으로도 좋은 것 🫶
reviews.content_en: Woong's picky taste aside, she ate this treat well from the start! Ever since I started feeding this daily after her hairball episodes, maybe it's just my imagination, but it seems like she's throwing up less...! For now, I'm planning to keep feeding it consistently. If it works well, I'll keep buying it. Just seeing my picky eater actually eating it well is already a win 🫶
